name: Espeland Van Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Martin County / south-central MN NEMT clients; not a school bus contractor
recent_news: Affiliated Espeland-run entity MN Para Transit Services Inc (Truman, MN) closed Aug 31, 2025 after ~30 years citing owner retirement; Lori and Daniel Espeland directed clients to Martin County HHS for alternatives.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Non-emergency medical transport van operator (NPI 1255416350), not a school-bus contractor; sister Espeland-owned NEMT entity already wound down in 2025 indicating broader family exit. No school district work.

name: Northern Access Trnsprtn Inc
districts_or_customers: Duluth/St. Louis County NEMT; healthcare facility trips; not a K-12 school bus contractor
recent_news: No recent M&A or material news identified; continues to operate as locally owned MnDOT STS-certified provider with ~25 wheelchair vans (per company site).
fit_notes: Weak fit for Summit. Pure NEMT/STS wheelchair-van operator in Duluth, MN; no yellow-bus or district SPED route contracts visible. Could be adjacency only if Summit wants to expand into MN NEMT/SPED-van work; not a yellow-bus tuck-in.

name: Guardian Transport
districts_or_customers: South Carolina NEMT (Lexington/Orangeburg/Columbia areas); Medicare/Medicaid/private pay; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Operating entity is Guardian Angels Medical Transportation LLC (mailing PO Box 753, Gaston, SC; physical office moved to 1681 Chestnut St, Orangeburg, SC); D&B estimates ~$1.3M revenue and ~32 employees.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Non-emergency medical transportation only (not school bus). Routes Medicare/Medicaid riders to medical appointments in SC; no K-12 district contracts found. Outside Summit's student-transportation thesis.

name: Auto Bus Amerlines Corp
districts_or_customers: No Miami-Dade or Broward school district contract identified; appears to be a small private charter/livery in North Miami Beach
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 823404, MC-362868) shows ACTIVE intrastate authority but only 2 power units, 1 driver, last updated 2010 - indicates a dormant or very small operation; no school-bus designation in cargo carried (passengers only).
fit_notes: Not a fit. Two-bus charter/livery operator in North Miami Beach with stale FMCSA registration; no evidence of Miami-Dade Public Schools or charter-school routing contracts. Too small and not confirmed as a student-transport contractor.

name: Manny School Transport LLC
service_types: intrastate private carrier (per FMCSA, transports dirt/sand/gravel and drive-away vehicles - name 'school transport' is misleading)
districts_or_customers: No Collier County Public Schools contract identified; FMCSA cargo classification is non-passenger
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 1695666, registered 7/30/2018) lists 1 power unit, 1 driver, intrastate private carrier hauling dirt/sand/gravel and drive/tow-away vehicles - inconsistent with student transportation despite the LLC name.
fit_notes: Not a fit. One-truck owner-operator in Naples whose FMCSA filing shows non-passenger cargo (dirt/sand/gravel, vehicle tow-away); does not appear to be an actual school-bus contractor despite the trade name. No CCPS contract evidence.
